items.description: Initialize Fabric.js canvas with basic element rendering, drag, resize, and rotate capabilities
acceptanceCriteria: Fabric.js canvas renders in the center panel
Users can add rectangle and text elements to canvas
Elements can be selected with click
Selected elements show transform handles (corners and edges)
Elements can be dragged to new positions
Elements can be resized by dragging corner handles
Elements can be rotated by dragging rotation handle
stepsToVerify: Navigate to /builder with editorMode='canvas'
Click 'Add Rectangle' button and verify shape appears on canvas
Click the rectangle to select it - verify blue selection border appears
Drag the rectangle - verify it moves to new position
Drag a corner handle - verify rectangle resizes proportionally
Drag rotation handle - verify element rotates

items.description: Implement zoom and pan controls for the canvas viewport
acceptanceCriteria: Zoom in/out buttons visible in canvas toolbar
Zoom level displays as percentage (e.g., '80%')
Zoom range: 50% to 200%
Zoom presets available: 50%, 80%, 100%, 150%, 200%
Canvas can be panned by holding Space + drag (optional)
Fit to screen button resets view to show full canvas
stepsToVerify: Click zoom in (+) button - verify canvas scale increases and percentage updates
Click zoom out (-) button - verify canvas scale decreases
Click percentage display - verify preset dropdown appears
Select '150%' preset - verify canvas zooms to 150%
Click 'Fit' button - verify entire canvas fits in viewport

items.description: Implement undo/redo functionality for all canvas operations
acceptanceCriteria: Undo button (Ctrl+Z) reverts last canvas change
Redo button (Ctrl+Shift+Z) restores undone change
History supports at least 50 operations
Undo/redo buttons show disabled state when unavailable
All element operations are undoable: add, delete, move, resize, rotate, property changes
stepsToVerify: Add element to canvas - verify it appears
Press Ctrl+Z - verify element is removed
Press Ctrl+Shift+Z - verify element reappears
Move element, then undo - verify element returns to original position
With empty history, verify undo button is disabled

items.description: Implement keyboard shortcuts for common canvas operations
acceptanceCriteria: Delete/Backspace removes selected element(s)
Ctrl+C copies selected element(s)
Ctrl+V pastes copied element(s) with offset
Ctrl+X cuts selected element(s)
Ctrl+D duplicates selected element(s)
Ctrl+A selects all elements
Arrow keys nudge selected element by 1px
Shift+Arrow keys nudge by 10px
Escape deselects all elements
stepsToVerify: Select element and press Delete - verify element is removed
Select element, Ctrl+C, then Ctrl+V - verify copy appears offset from original
Select element, Ctrl+D - verify duplicate appears
Press Ctrl+A - verify all elements are selected
Select element, press Arrow Right - verify element moves 1px right
Press Escape - verify nothing is selected

items.description: Update left tool sidebar with hunbei.com-style tool categories
acceptanceCriteria: Sidebar shows vertical icon buttons
Tools include: Sections, Templates, Text, Assets, Components, Settings
Each tool has icon and tooltip on hover
Active tool is visually highlighted
Clicking tool switches the content browser panel
stepsToVerify: Verify sidebar displays 6+ tool icons vertically
Hover over each icon - verify tooltip shows tool name
Click 'Templates' tool - verify it becomes highlighted
Click 'Components' tool - verify content browser switches to components panel

items.description: Implement Templates gallery panel in content browser
acceptanceCriteria: Templates panel shows grid of template thumbnails
Each template has preview image and name
Clicking template shows preview dialog
Apply button loads template elements onto canvas
At least 5 starter templates available (elegant, modern, rustic, minimal, floral)
stepsToVerify: Click Templates tool - verify grid of templates appears
Verify at least 5 templates are displayed with thumbnails
Click a template thumbnail - verify preview dialog opens
Click 'Apply' in preview - verify canvas is populated with template elements

items.description: Implement Components library panel with wedding widgets
acceptanceCriteria: Components panel shows categorized widget list
Categories: Interactive (countdown, map), Forms (RSVP), Media (gallery)
Each component has icon, name, and description
Dragging component to canvas adds it as widget element
Available widgets: Countdown Timer, Venue Map, RSVP Form, Photo Gallery, Schedule Timeline
stepsToVerify: Click Components tool - verify categorized widget list appears
Verify 'Countdown Timer' widget is listed under Interactive
Drag 'Countdown Timer' onto canvas - verify countdown widget appears
Drag 'Venue Map' onto canvas - verify map widget appears
Drag 'RSVP Form' onto canvas - verify form widget appears

items.description: Implement Text styles panel with pre-styled text blocks
acceptanceCriteria: Text panel shows list of pre-styled text options
Styles include: Heading, Subheading, Body, Quote, Caption
Each style shows preview of font/size/color
Clicking or dragging style adds text element to canvas
Added text elements are editable
stepsToVerify: Click Text tool - verify list of text styles appears
Verify at least 5 text styles are available
Click 'Heading' style - verify large styled text appears on canvas
Double-click the added text on canvas - verify it becomes editable
Type new text - verify it updates

items.description: Implement Assets panel with decorative stickers and elements
acceptanceCriteria: Assets panel shows searchable grid of decorative elements
Categories: Flowers, Frames, Dividers, Icons, Shapes
Each asset has thumbnail preview
Dragging asset to canvas adds it as image element
Search box filters assets by name/tag
stepsToVerify: Click Assets tool - verify grid of decorative elements appears
Verify category tabs/filters for Flowers, Frames, etc.
Drag a flower sticker onto canvas - verify it appears as image element
Type 'frame' in search - verify only frame assets are shown

items.description: Implement element-based properties panel that changes based on selection
acceptanceCriteria: No selection: shows page/canvas properties (background color, size)
Text selected: shows text properties (font, size, color, alignment)
Image selected: shows image properties (replace, crop, flip, border)
Widget selected: shows widget-specific config
Multi-selection: shows only common properties
stepsToVerify: With nothing selected - verify panel shows 'Canvas Properties' with background options
Select a text element - verify panel switches to show font picker, size slider, color picker
Select an image element - verify panel shows Replace button, crop, flip options
Select a countdown widget - verify panel shows date/time configuration

items.description: Implement Text element properties editor
acceptanceCriteria: Font family picker with Google Fonts options
Font size slider/input (8-200px)
Font weight toggle (normal/bold)
Font style toggle (normal/italic)
Text color picker
Text alignment buttons (left, center, right, justify)
Line height slider
Letter spacing slider
Changes apply in real-time to canvas
stepsToVerify: Select text element on canvas
Change font family - verify text updates to new font
Increase font size to 48px - verify text enlarges
Click bold toggle - verify text becomes bold
Change color to red - verify text color updates
Click center align - verify text centers within its bounds

items.description: Implement Image element properties editor
acceptanceCriteria: Replace image button opens file picker
Horizontal flip button
Vertical flip button
Opacity slider (0-100%)
Border width input
Border color picker
Border radius slider
Crop button opens crop tool (optional for v1)
stepsToVerify: Select image element on canvas
Click Replace - verify file picker opens and new image replaces old
Click Horizontal Flip - verify image flips horizontally
Set opacity to 50% - verify image becomes semi-transparent
Set border width to 2px - verify border appears around image
Set border radius to 10px - verify corners become rounded

items.description: Implement Position/Transform properties editor for all elements
acceptanceCriteria: X position input (pixels from left)
Y position input (pixels from top)
Width input
Height input
Rotation input (degrees)
Lock aspect ratio toggle
Changes sync bidirectionally with canvas
stepsToVerify: Select element on canvas
Change X to 100 - verify element moves horizontally
Change Y to 200 - verify element moves vertically
Change width to 300 - verify element resizes
Change rotation to 45 - verify element rotates 45 degrees
Drag element on canvas - verify position inputs update

items.description: Implement layers panel showing all canvas elements with z-index management
acceptanceCriteria: Layers panel lists all elements by z-index (top to bottom)
Each layer row shows element type icon and name/preview
Clicking layer row selects element on canvas
Eye icon toggles element visibility
Lock icon toggles element editing lock
Drag rows to reorder z-index
Context menu: Bring to Front, Send to Back, Bring Forward, Send Backward
stepsToVerify: Add 3 elements to canvas
Open layers panel - verify all 3 elements listed
Click a layer row - verify corresponding element is selected on canvas
Click eye icon - verify element becomes hidden on canvas
Click lock icon - verify element cannot be moved/resized
Drag layer row to new position - verify z-index changes on canvas

items.description: Implement page thumbnails panel for multi-page navigation
acceptanceCriteria: Bottom panel shows horizontal scrollable list of page thumbnails
Each thumbnail shows miniature preview of page content
Active page is highlighted
Clicking thumbnail navigates to that page
Add page button (+) creates new blank page
Delete button (on hover) removes page
Drag thumbnails to reorder pages
stepsToVerify: Verify bottom panel shows current page thumbnail
Click + button - verify new page is created and shown
Click new page thumbnail - verify canvas switches to empty page
Add element to page 2 - verify thumbnail preview updates
Hover over page thumbnail and click delete - verify page is removed

items.description: Implement canvas state persistence to database
acceptanceCriteria: Canvas state auto-saves after changes (1-second debounce)
Save indicator shows: 'Saving...', 'Saved', 'Error' states
Canvas state stored as JSON in canvasStates table
Reloading page restores canvas to last saved state
Multiple pages and all element properties are preserved
stepsToVerify: Add elements to canvas - verify 'Saving...' indicator appears
Wait 2 seconds - verify 'Saved' indicator appears
Refresh the page - verify all elements are restored in correct positions
Add a second page with elements, refresh - verify both pages restored

items.description: Implement database schema changes for canvas editor
acceptanceCriteria: canvasStates table exists with: id, invitationId, canvasData (JSON), version, updatedAt
invitations table has editorMode column (values: 'structured' | 'canvas')
Foreign key: canvasStates.invitationId references invitations.id
ON DELETE CASCADE removes canvas state when invitation deleted
stepsToVerify: Run pnpm db:push - verify migrations apply without errors
Open Drizzle Studio - verify canvasStates table exists with correct columns
Verify invitations table has editorMode column
Delete an invitation - verify associated canvasStates record is deleted

items.description: Implement canvas export to PNG/JPEG image
acceptanceCriteria: Export button in header opens export dialog
Format options: PNG, JPEG
Quality slider for JPEG (1-100%)
Preview shows export result
Download button saves file to user's device
Exported image matches canvas appearance
stepsToVerify: Add elements to canvas
Click Export button - verify dialog opens
Select PNG format - verify preview shows image
Click Download - verify PNG file downloads
Open downloaded file - verify it matches canvas

items.description: Implement mode switching between structured and canvas editor
acceptanceCriteria: Settings shows 'Editor Mode' toggle: Structured / Canvas
Switching to Canvas mode creates canvas state from structured data
One-way migration: structured sections convert to positioned elements
Existing invitations remain in structured mode by default
Warning dialog confirms mode switch (cannot undo)
stepsToVerify: Open existing invitation in structured mode
Navigate to Settings - verify Editor Mode toggle exists
Click 'Switch to Canvas' - verify warning dialog appears
Confirm switch - verify canvas editor loads with converted elements
Verify hero image, names, date appear as positioned elements on canvas

items.description: Implement Countdown Timer widget for canvas
acceptanceCriteria: Countdown widget can be added from Components panel
Widget displays days, hours, minutes, seconds until target date
Properties panel allows setting target date/time
Widget auto-updates (countdown ticks in real-time)
Styling options: font, colors, layout (horizontal/vertical)
stepsToVerify: Drag Countdown Timer from Components to canvas
Verify countdown displays with default date
In properties, change target date to tomorrow - verify countdown updates
Wait 1+ seconds - verify seconds counter decrements
Change font color - verify widget styling updates

items.description: Implement Venue Map widget for canvas
acceptanceCriteria: Map widget can be added from Components panel
Properties panel allows entering address or coordinates
Map shows pin at specified location
Map is interactive (pan/zoom) in preview mode
Styling options: map style, pin color, zoom level
stepsToVerify: Drag Venue Map from Components to canvas
Verify empty map placeholder appears
Enter venue address in properties - verify map updates to show location
Preview the invitation - verify map is interactive

items.description: Implement RSVP Form widget for canvas
acceptanceCriteria: RSVP Form widget can be added from Components panel
Form includes: Name, Email, Attending (Yes/No), Guest count, Message
Properties panel allows customizing which fields to show
Form submissions save to existing RSVP system
Styling options: colors, font, button style
stepsToVerify: Drag RSVP Form from Components to canvas
Verify form displays with default fields
In properties, toggle off 'Email' field - verify it disappears from form
Preview and submit RSVP - verify response saves to database

items.description: Implement Photo Gallery widget for canvas
acceptanceCriteria: Gallery widget can be added from Components panel
Properties panel allows uploading/selecting images
Gallery displays images in carousel or grid layout
Layout options: Carousel, Grid (2x2, 3x3), Masonry
Navigation: arrows, dots, swipe in preview mode
stepsToVerify: Drag Photo Gallery from Components to canvas
Verify empty gallery placeholder appears
Upload 3 images via properties - verify they appear in gallery
Switch layout to Grid - verify images display in grid format
Preview invitation - verify gallery navigation works

items.description: Implement alignment guides (smart guides) when moving elements
acceptanceCriteria: When dragging element, alignment guides appear at edges/centers
Guides show when element aligns with other elements
Guides show when element aligns with canvas edges/center
Element snaps to guide when within 5px
Guides are pink/red lines for visibility
stepsToVerify: Add two elements to canvas
Drag second element near first element's edge - verify vertical guide line appears
Continue dragging until edges align - verify element snaps to alignment
Drag element toward canvas center - verify center guide appears

items.description: Implement multi-select for batch element operations
acceptanceCriteria: Shift+click adds/removes elements from selection
Click-drag on empty canvas creates marquee selection box
Elements fully within marquee are selected
Selected elements can be moved together
Delete key removes all selected elements
Properties panel shows 'Multiple selected' with common properties only
stepsToVerify: Add 3 elements to canvas
Click first element, then Shift+click second - verify both selected
Drag from empty area - verify marquee box appears
Release when box covers 2 elements - verify both selected
Drag selected elements - verify they move together maintaining relative positions
